name: Corn Fritters
keywords: corn mexican sauces side dish vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. See Sowest 2 for Roasted Tomato Sauce Recipe.
2. Combine the tomato sauce, vegetable oil, flour, milk, baking powder, and eggs in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Add the whole kernel corn to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
4. Heat a large skillet over medium heat with vegetable oil.
5. Pour the batter into the hot skillet, forming small patties.
6. Cook the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
7. Turn off the heat and serve the corn fritters warm.
